title: Form submission triage
goal: Review recent form submissions, identify uncontacted leads, and create follow-up tasks.

steps.description: List forms so the user can choose a form ID when one is not provided.
Fetch submissions for the selected form and date range.
Use the insight helper to identify form leads without follow-up.
Create a task for each approved uncontacted lead.

input.title: Follow up on form submission
input.body: Review form submission and respond with the appropriate next step.

output: Return submissions reviewed, uncontacted leads found, and tasks created.
